items.description: Space planning & conceptual layout — Initial site measurement, 2D floor plan with furniture layout, 1 round of revision. Includes consultation on spatial flow, storage planning, and electrical point mapping.
Working drawings package — Detailed construction drawings for carpentry (elevations + sections), electrical layout, plumbing layout, ceiling plan. Used by site team for accurate execution.

HDB renovation permit submission — Online application via HDB portal, upload of renovation scope, contractor license details, and floor plans. Includes permit fee and admin handling. Processing: ~3 working days.

Project management & site supervision — 10 scheduled site visits over renovation period. Coordinate trade sequencing, verify workmanship against drawings, manage material deliveries, handle defect flagging.
Floor & corridor protection — Lay thick plastic sheeting and cardboard over all floors and shared corridors to prevent scratches and dust during construction. Supply + install.
Lift protection & management booking — Install padded plywood panels inside the service lift. Includes management booking fee and removal after project.
Common bathroom — Hack and remove all floor tiles down to concrete base. Jackhammer work + debris removal. ~38 sqft.
Common bathroom — Hack and remove all wall tiles floor to ceiling. Careful removal near pipes. ~171 sqft.
Master bathroom — Hack and remove all floor tiles down to concrete base. Jackhammer work + debris removal. ~38 sqft.
Master bathroom — Hack and remove all wall tiles floor to ceiling. Careful removal near pipes. ~171 sqft.
Kitchen — Hack and remove floor tiles. Jackhammer + debris removal. ~65 sqft.
Debris disposal — Truck hacked tiles, cement, and waste to licensed disposal facility. Labour + transport + disposal fees.
Common bathroom floor tiling — Supply and lay porcelain tiles (300×600mm, non-slip). Includes adhesive, grouting, slope to floor trap. Material: porcelain tiles. ~38 sqft.
Common bathroom wall tiling — Supply and lay ceramic wall tiles (300×600mm, glazed) floor to ceiling. Includes adhesive, grouting, and edge trims. Material: ceramic tiles. ~171 sqft.
Master bathroom floor tiling — Supply and lay porcelain tiles (300×600mm, non-slip). Includes adhesive, grouting, slope to floor trap. Material: porcelain tiles. ~38 sqft.
Master bathroom wall tiling — Supply and lay ceramic wall tiles (300×600mm, glazed) floor to ceiling. Includes adhesive, grouting, and edge trims. Material: ceramic tiles. ~171 sqft.
Kitchen backsplash — Supply and lay tiles between base and upper cabinets (~600mm strip). Includes adhesive, grouting. Material: ceramic/porcelain. ~20 sqft.
Bathroom floor screeding — Cement screed (~25mm thick) over concrete base for level surface with drainage slope. Material: cement + sand. ~76 sqft.
Common bathroom waterproofing — 2-coat liquid membrane (Sika/Mapei) over floor and 150mm up walls. Includes 48-hour ponding test. ~42 sqft.
Master bathroom waterproofing — 2-coat liquid membrane (Sika/Mapei) over floor and 150mm up walls. Includes 48-hour ponding test. ~42 sqft.
Kitchen base cabinets — 18mm marine plywood carcass, melamine laminate doors, Blum soft-close hinges. H: 820mm, D: 580mm. Length: 3m. Factory fabrication + install.
Kitchen upper wall cabinets — 18mm plywood carcass, melamine laminate doors, Blum soft-close. H: 600mm, D: 300mm. Length: 3m. Fabrication + wall mounting.
Kitchen countertop — 15mm quartz stone (Caesarstone or equiv). Includes sink cutout, polished edges, silicone sealing. Length: 3m, D: 580mm.
Master bedroom wardrobe — Full-height built-in, 18mm plywood, melamine laminate, 2-panel sliding doors (aluminium frame). H: 2400mm, D: 600mm, W: 2.7m (wall-to-wall). Factory fab + install.
Master bedroom wardrobe internal fittings — 2 drawers (soft-close runners), trouser rack, 3-tier shelving, hanging rod. 18mm plywood + melamine.
Bedroom 2 wardrobe — Full-height built-in, 18mm plywood, melamine laminate, 2-panel sliding doors (aluminium frame). H: 2400mm, D: 600mm, W: 2.7m (wall-to-wall). Factory fab + install.
Bedroom 2 wardrobe internal fittings — 2 drawers (soft-close runners), trouser rack, 3-tier shelving, hanging rod. 18mm plywood + melamine.
Bedroom 3 wardrobe — Full-height built-in, 18mm plywood, melamine laminate, 2-panel sliding doors (aluminium frame). H: 2400mm, D: 600mm, W: 2.7m (wall-to-wall). Factory fab + install.
Bedroom 3 wardrobe internal fittings — 2 drawers (soft-close runners), trouser rack, 3-tier shelving, hanging rod. 18mm plywood + melamine.
Shoe cabinet — Built-in at entrance. 18mm plywood, laminate finish, soft-close doors, ventilation slots. ~1.2m wide × 400mm deep × 1.2m tall.
Master bedroom door — Laminate hollow-core door with frame and Everite lock set. Supply + install.
Bedroom 2 door — Laminate hollow-core door with frame and Everite lock set. Supply + install.
Bedroom 3 door — Laminate hollow-core door with frame and Everite lock set. Supply + install.
Common bathroom door — Aluminium bi-fold or swing door with ventilation louvers. Supply + install.
Master bathroom door — Aluminium bi-fold or swing door with ventilation louvers. Supply + install.
Vinyl plank flooring (living room + 3 bedroom(s)) — 4mm SPC click-lock, no glue. Includes underlay foam, edge trims, quarter-round skirting. Material: Korean/European SPC vinyl planks. ~827 sqft.
Whole house painting — 1 coat sealer + 2 coats emulsion (Nippon/Dulux). Wall prep, patching, masking, cleanup. Up to 3 colour choices. ~3098 sqft.
Ceiling painting — 1 coat flat/matte white ceiling paint. Roller application + edge cutting. ~744 sqft.
Full house rewiring — Replace all wiring from DB box. PVC-insulated copper cables (2.5mm² power, 1.5mm² lighting). New circuit breakers, wall chasing, patching. Licensed electrician.
Power points (13A twin) — 14 outlets: 4 kitchen, 6 bedrooms, 4 living. Legrand/Schneider faceplates, back box, wiring. Licensed electrician.
Kitchen sink — 304 stainless steel single-bowl (~750×450mm) + pull-out mixer tap. Hot/cold supply, waste pipe, silicone seal. Plumber.
Common bathroom mixer taps (×2) — Chrome-plated brass, 1 basin + 1 shower. Supply lines + leak test. Plumber.
Common bathroom toilet (WC) — Wall-hung bowl + concealed cistern (Geberit). Mounting frame, flush plate, waste pipe. Plumber.
Common bathroom shower set — Rain shower head (200mm) + handheld shower on slide bar. Chrome finish. Plumber.
Common bathroom floor trap — Stainless steel anti-odour floor trap replacement. Plumber.
Common bathroom shower screen — 10mm tempered safety glass, frameless fixed panel (~900×1900mm). SS brackets + silicone. Glazier.
Common bathroom mirror — Wall-mounted bevelled mirror (~600×800mm) with concealed fixings.
Common bathroom accessories set — Towel rack, soap dish, robe hook, toilet roll holder. Stainless steel, wall-mounted.
Common bathroom exhaust fan — Ceiling-mounted ventilation fan with ducting to exterior. Wired to light switch.
Master bathroom mixer taps (×2) — Chrome-plated brass, 1 basin + 1 shower. Supply lines + leak test. Plumber.
Master bathroom toilet (WC) — Wall-hung bowl + concealed cistern (Geberit). Mounting frame, flush plate, waste pipe. Plumber.
Master bathroom shower set — Rain shower head (200mm) + handheld shower on slide bar. Chrome finish. Plumber.
Master bathroom floor trap — Stainless steel anti-odour floor trap replacement. Plumber.
Master bathroom shower screen — 10mm tempered safety glass, frameless fixed panel (~900×1900mm). SS brackets + silicone. Glazier.
Master bathroom mirror — Wall-mounted bevelled mirror (~600×800mm) with concealed fixings.
Master bathroom accessories set — Towel rack, soap dish, robe hook, toilet roll holder. Stainless steel, wall-mounted.
Master bathroom exhaust fan — Ceiling-mounted ventilation fan with ducting to exterior. Wired to light switch.

Aircon system (4-unit multi-split) — 1 outdoor + 4 indoor FCU (1 living, 3 bedroom(s)). Copper piping, condensate drain, trunking, electrical. Daikin/Mitsubishi/Midea inverter. Gas charge + commissioning.
Post-renovation deep cleaning — Vacuum, mop, wipe cabinets (inside + outside), clean glass/mirrors, remove cement stains, clean fixtures, remove protective covers. Crew of 2-3, ~4-6 hours.
Window grilles (7 windows) — Mild steel vertical bar grilles, powder-coated black/white. HDB-compliant design. Supply + install.
